name: AMC Entertainment Holdings Inc. AMC Preferred Equity Units each constituting a depositary share representing a 1/100th interest in a share of Series A Convertible Participating Preferred Stock
summary: AMC Entertainment Holdings Inc. is a movie theater chain that owns, operates, and has interests in theaters located primarily in the United States and Europe. The company provides moviegoers with various amenities, including food and beverage services, and premium formats like IMAX and Dolby Cinema. The AMC Preferred Equity Units represent a fractional interest in preferred stock.
